title: Ayat Al-Kursi
arabic: اللَّهُ لَا إِلَٰهَ إِلَّا هُوَ الْحَيُّ الْقَيُّومُ ۚ لَا تَأْخُذُهُ سِنَةٌ وَلَا نَوْمٌ ۚ لَهُ مَا فِي السَّمَاوَاتِ وَمَا فِي الْأَرْضِ ۗ مَنْ ذَا الَّذِي يَشْفَعُ عِنْدَهُ إِلَّا بِإِذْنِهِ ۚ يَعْلَمُ مَا بَيْنَ أَيْدِيهِمْ وَمَا خَلْفَهُمْ وَلَا يُحِيطُونَ بِشَيْءٍ مِنْ عِلْمِهِ إِلَّا بِمَا شَاءَ ۚ وَسِعَ كُرْسِيُّهُ السَّمَاوَاتِ وَالْأَرْضَ ۖ وَلَا يَئُودُهُ حِفْظُهُمَا ۚ وَهُوَ الْعَلِيُّ الْعَظِيمُ
translation: Allah! There is no deity except Him, the Ever-Living, the Sustainer of all existence. Neither drowsiness overtakes Him nor sleep. To Him belongs whatever is in the heavens and whatever is on the earth. Who is it that can intercede with Him except by His permission? He knows what is before them and what is behind them, and they encompass nothing of His knowledge except what He wills. His Kursi extends over the heavens and the earth, and their preservation does not tire Him. And He is the Most High, the Most Great.

title: Morning Dhikr (We have entered morning)
arabic: أَصْبَحْنَا وَأَصْبَحَ الْمُلْكُ لِلَّهِ وَالْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ، لَا إِلَٰهَ إِلَّا اللَّهُ وَحْدَهُ لَا شَرِيكَ لَهُ، لَهُ الْمُلْكُ وَلَهُ الْحَمْدُ وَهُوَ عَلَىٰ كُلِّ شَيْءٍ قَدِيرٌ
translation: We have entered the morning and at this very time all sovereignty belongs to Allah. All praise is for Allah. There is no god but Allah alone, He has no partner. To Him belongs the dominion and to Him belongs all praise, and He is over all things capable.

title: Morning Protection (Allah's Name Protection)
arabic: بِسْمِ اللَّهِ الَّذِي لَا يَضُرُّ مَعَ اسْمِهِ شَيْءٌ فِي الْأَرْضِ وَلَا فِي السَّمَاءِ وَهُوَ السَّمِيعُ الْعَلِيمُ
translation: In the Name of Allah, with whose Name nothing can cause harm in the earth or in the heavens, and He is the All-Hearing, All-Knowing.

title: Allah is sufficient for me
arabic: حَسْبِيَ اللَّهُ لَا إِلَٰهَ إِلَّا هُوَ ۖ عَلَيْهِ تَوَكَّلْتُ وَهُوَ رَبُّ الْعَرْشِ الْعَظِيمِ
translation: Allah is sufficient for me. There is no god but Him. Upon Him I rely, and He is the Lord of the Mighty Throne.

title: Seeking Well-being
arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ الْعَافِيَةَ فِي الدُّنْيَا وَالْآخِرَةِ
translation: O Allah, I ask You for well-being in this world and in the Hereafter.

title: Seeking Forgiveness
arabic: أَسْتَغْفِرُ اللَّهَ وَأَتُوبُ إِلَيْهِ
translation: I seek forgiveness from Allah and repent to Him.

title: I am pleased with Allah
arabic: رَضِيتُ بِاللَّهِ رَبًّا وَبِالإِسْلَامِ دِينًا وَبِمُحَمَّدٍ ﷺ نَبِيًّا
translation: I am pleased with Allah as my Lord, with Islam as my religion, and with Muhammad ﷺ as my Prophet.

title: Trust in Allah
arabic: تَوَكَّلْتُ عَلَى اللَّهِ
translation: I place my trust in Allah.

title: Protection from Harm
arabic: بِسْمِ اللَّهِ الَّذِي لَا يَضُرُّ مَعَ اسْمِهِ شَيْءٌ فِي الْأَرْضِ وَلَا فِي السَّمَاءِ وَهُوَ السَّمِيعُ الْعَلِيمُ
translation: In the Name of Allah, with whose Name nothing can harm in the earth or in the heavens, and He is the All-Hearing, All-Knowing.

title: Allah’s Protection Request
arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنَ الْهَمِّ وَالْحَزَنِ
translation: O Allah, I seek refuge in You from anxiety and grief.

title: Seeking Light in Heart
arabic: اللَّهُمَّ اجْعَلْ فِي قَلْبِي نُورًا
translation: O Allah, place light in my heart.

title: Seeking Light in Life
arabic: وَفِي لِسَانِي نُورًا وَفِي سَمْعِي نُورًا
translation: And light in my tongue and light in my hearing.

title: Seeking Light Everywhere
arabic: وَفِي بَصَرِي نُورًا وَمِنْ فَوْقِي نُورًا وَمِنْ تَحْتِي نُورًا
translation: And light in my sight, and above me light, and below me light.

title: Complete Protection
arabic: اللَّهُمَّ احْفَظْنِي مِنْ بَيْنِ يَدَيَّ وَمِنْ خَلْفِي
translation: O Allah, protect me from in front of me and from behind me.

title: Protection from Above and Below
arabic: وَعَنْ يَمِينِي وَعَنْ شِمَالِي
translation: And from my right and from my left.

title: Protection from Sudden Harm
arabic: وَمِنْ فَوْقِي وَأَعُوذُ بِعَظَمَتِكَ أَنْ أُغْتَالَ مِنْ تَحْتِي
translation: And from above me, and I seek refuge in Your greatness from being harmed from beneath me.

title: Morning Remembrance
arabic: اللَّهُمَّ بِكَ أَصْبَحْنَا وَبِكَ أَمْسَيْنَا وَبِكَ نَحْيَا وَبِكَ نَمُوتُ وَإِلَيْكَ النُّشُورُ
translation: O Allah, by You we enter the morning, by You we enter the evening, by You we live and by You we die, and to You is the resurrection.

title: Praise of Allah
arabic: اللَّهُمَّ مَا أَصْبَحَ بِي مِنْ نِعْمَةٍ فَمِنْكَ وَحْدَكَ لَا شَرِيكَ لَكَ
translation: O Allah, whatever blessing I or anyone of Your creation has entered the morning with is from You alone, with no partner.

title: Protection from Evil
arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ شَرِّ مَا صَنَعْتُ
translation: O Allah, I seek refuge in You from the evil of what I have done.

title: Seeking Guidance
arabic: اللَّهُمَّ اهْدِنِي فِيمَنْ هَدَيْتَ
translation: O Allah, guide me among those You have guided.

title: Strength in Faith
arabic: وَعَافِنِي فِيمَنْ عَافَيْتَ
translation: Grant me well-being among those You have granted well-being.

title: Blessings Request
arabic: وَتَوَلَّنِي فِيمَنْ تَوَلَّيْتَ
translation: Take me into Your care among those You have taken into Your care.

title: Protection from Decree
arabic: وَبَارِكْ لِي فِيمَا أَعْطَيْتَ
translation: Bless for me what You have given.

title: Protection from Evil Decree
arabic: وَقِنِي شَرَّ مَا قَضَيْتَ
translation: Protect me from the evil of what You have decreed.

title: Evening Dhikr
arabic: أَمْسَيْنَا وَأَمْسَى الْمُلْكُ لِلَّهِ وَالْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ، لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا اللَّهُ وَحْدَهُ لَا شَرِيكَ لَهُ، لَهُ الْمُلْكُ وَلَهُ الْحَمْدُ وَهُوَ عَلَى كُلِّ شَيْءٍ قَدِيرٌ
translation: We have entered the evening and all sovereignty belongs to Allah. All praise is for Allah. There is no god except Allah alone, without any partner. To Him belongs the dominion and to Him belongs all praise, and He has power over all things.

title: Evening Protection
arabic: بِسْمِ اللَّهِ الَّذِي لَا يَضُرُّ مَعَ اسْمِهِ شَيْءٌ فِي الْأَرْضِ وَلَا فِي السَّمَاءِ وَهُوَ السَّمِيعُ الْعَلِيمُ
translation: In the Name of Allah, with whose Name nothing can harm in the earth or in the heavens, and He is the All-Hearing, All-Knowing.

title: Seeking Forgiveness Evening
arabic: أَسْتَغْفِرُ اللَّهَ وَأَتُوبُ إِلَيْهِ
translation: I seek forgiveness from Allah and repent to Him.

title: Ayat Al-Kursi
arabic: اللَّهُ لَا إِلَٰهَ إِلَّا هُوَ الْحَيُّ الْقَيُّومُ ۚ لَا تَأْخُذُهُ سِنَةٌ وَلَا نَوْمٌ ۚ لَهُ مَا فِي السَّمَاوَاتِ وَمَا فِي الْأَرْضِ ۗ مَنْ ذَا الَّذِي يَشْفَعُ عِنْدَهُ إِلَّا بِإِذْنِهِ ۚ يَعْلَمُ مَا بَيْنَ أَيْدِيهِمْ وَمَا خَلْفَهُمْ وَلَا يُحِيطُونَ بِشَيْءٍ مِنْ عِلْمِهِ إِلَّا بِمَا شَاءَ ۚ وَسِعَ كُرْسِيُّهُ السَّمَاوَاتِ وَالْأَرْضَ ۖ وَلَا يَئُودُهُ حِفْظُهُمَا ۚ وَهُوَ الْعَلِيُّ الْعَظِيمُ
translation: Allah! There is no deity except Him, the Ever-Living, the Sustainer of all existence. Neither drowsiness overtakes Him nor sleep. To Him belongs whatever is in the heavens and whatever is on the earth. Who is it that can intercede with Him except by His permission? He knows what is before them and what is behind them, and they encompass nothing of His knowledge except what He wills. His Kursi extends over the heavens and the earth, and their preservation does not tire Him. And He is the Most High, the Most Great.

title: Protection from Harm
arabic: قُلْ هُوَ اللَّهُ أَحَدٌ ۝ اللَّهُ الصَّمَدُ ۝ لَمْ يَلِدْ وَلَمْ يُولَدْ ۝ وَلَمْ يَكُن لَّهُ كُفُوًا أَحَدٌ
translation: Say: He is Allah, One. Allah, the Eternal Refuge. He neither begets nor is born, nor is there to Him any equivalent.

title: Seeking Allah's Protection
arabic: أَعُوذُ بِرَبِّ الْفَلَقِ ۝ مِن شَرِّ مَا خَلَقَ
translation: I seek refuge in the Lord of the daybreak, from the evil of what He has created.

title: Seeking Refuge from Evil
arabic: قُلْ أَعُوذُ بِرَبِّ النَّاسِ ۝ مَلِكِ النَّاسِ ۝ إِلَٰهِ النَّاسِ ۝ مِن شَرِّ الْوَسْوَاسِ الْخَنَّاسِ
translation: Say: I seek refuge in the Lord of mankind, the King of mankind, the God of mankind, from the evil of the whisperer who withdraws.

title: Evening Faith Declaration
arabic: رَضِيتُ بِاللَّهِ رَبًّا وَبِالإِسْلَامِ دِينًا وَبِمُحَمَّدٍ ﷺ نَبِيًّا
translation: I am pleased with Allah as my Lord, Islam as my religion, and Muhammad ﷺ as my Prophet.

title: Glory and Praise of Allah
arabic: سُبْحَانَ اللَّهِ وَبِحَمْدِهِ
translation: Glory is to Allah and all praise is for Him.

title: Seeking Forgiveness
arabic: سُبْحَانَ اللَّهِ وَبِحَمْدِهِ، أَسْتَغْفِرُ اللَّهَ وَأَتُوبُ إِلَيْهِ
translation: Glory is to Allah and praise is for Him. I seek forgiveness from Allah and repent to Him.

title: Praise of Allah's Creation
arabic: سُبْحَانَ اللَّهِ عَدَدَ خَلْقِهِ، وَرِضَا نَفْسِهِ، وَزِنَةَ عَرْشِهِ، وَمِدَادَ كَلِمَاتِهِ
translation: Glory is to Allah as many times as the number of His creation, as much as pleases Him, as much as the weight of His Throne, and as much as the ink of His words.

title: Protection from Weakness
arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنَ الْهَمِّ وَالْحَزَنِ، وَأَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنَ الْعَجْزِ وَالْكَسَلِ
translation: O Allah, I seek refuge in You from anxiety and sorrow, and I seek refuge in You from weakness and laziness.

title: Evening Trust in Allah
arabic: تَوَكَّلْتُ عَلَى اللَّهِ، لَا حَوْلَ وَلَا قُوَّةَ إِلَّا بِاللَّهِ
translation: I put my trust in Allah. There is no power and no strength except with Allah.

title: Seeking Protection from Four Things
arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنَ الْبُخْلِ، وَأَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنَ الْجُبْنِ، وَأَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ أَنْ أُرَدَّ إِلَى أَرْذَلِ الْعُمُرِ
translation: O Allah, I seek refuge in You from miserliness, I seek refuge in You from cowardice, and I seek refuge in You from being returned to the worst stage of life.

title: Seeking Goodness
arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ خَيْرَ هَذِهِ اللَّيْلَةِ وَخَيْرَ مَا فِيهَا، وَأَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ شَرِّهَا وَشَرِّ مَا فِيهَا
translation: O Allah, I ask You for the goodness of this night and the goodness within it, and I seek refuge in You from its evil and the evil within it.

title: Remembering Allah
arabic: لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا اللَّهُ وَحْدَهُ لَا شَرِيكَ لَهُ، لَهُ الْمُلْكُ وَلَهُ الْحَمْدُ وَهُوَ عَلَى كُلِّ شَيْءٍ قَدِيرٌ
translation: There is no god except Allah alone, without any partner. To Him belongs the dominion and all praise, and He is over all things capable.

title: Sending Blessings Upon Prophet ﷺ
arabic: اللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ وَسَلِّمْ عَلَى نَبِيِّنَا مُحَمَّدٍ
translation: O Allah, send prayers and peace upon our Prophet Muhammad ﷺ.

title: Seeking Paradise and Protection from Fire
arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ الْجَنَّةَ وَأَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنَ النَّارِ
translation: O Allah, I ask You for Paradise and I seek refuge in You from the Fire.

title: Travel Dua (Leaving Home)
arabic: بِسْمِ اللَّهِ، تَوَكَّلْتُ عَلَى اللَّهِ، وَلَا حَوْلَ وَلَا قُوَّةَ إِلَّا بِاللَّهِ
translation: In the Name of Allah, I place my trust in Allah, and there is no power and no strength except with Allah.

title: Dua Before Riding
arabic: بِسْمِ اللَّهِ، الْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ
translation: In the Name of Allah, all praise is for Allah.

title: Travel Vehicle Dua
arabic: سُبْحَانَ الَّذِي سَخَّرَ لَنَا هَٰذَا وَمَا كُنَّا لَهُ مُقْرِنِينَ ۝ وَإِنَّا إِلَىٰ رَبِّنَا لَمُنقَلِبُونَ
translation: Glory is to Him who has subjected this to us, and we could not have controlled it. And indeed, to our Lord we will surely return.

title: Travel Ease Dua
arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنَّا نَسْأَلُكَ فِي سَفَرِنَا هَٰذَا الْبِرَّ وَالتَّقْوَىٰ، وَمِنَ الْعَمَلِ مَا تَرْضَىٰ
translation: O Allah, we ask You for righteousness and piety in this journey of ours, and deeds that please You.

title: Protection During Travel
arabic: اللَّهُمَّ هَوِّنْ عَلَيْنَا سَفَرَنَا هَٰذَا وَاطْوِ عَنَّا بُعْدَهُ
translation: O Allah, make this journey easy for us and shorten its distance for us.

title: Returning From Travel
arabic: آيِبُونَ تَائِبُونَ عَابِدُونَ لِرَبِّنَا حَامِدُونَ
translation: We return, repent, worship and praise our Lord.

title: Seeking Protection From Journey Difficulties
arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ وَعْثَاءِ السَّفَرِ وَكَآبَةِ الْمُنْقَلَبِ
translation: O Allah, I seek refuge in You from the difficulties of travel and from an unpleasant return.

title: Protection of Family and Wealth
arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنَّا نَسْأَلُكَ الْحِفْظَ فِي السَّفَرِ وَالْأَهْلِ وَالْمَالِ
translation: O Allah, we ask You for protection during our journey and protection for our family and wealth.

title: Glorifying Allah During Travel
arabic: اللَّهُ أَكْبَرُ، اللَّهُ أَكْبَرُ، اللَّهُ أَكْبَرُ
translation: Allah is the Greatest, Allah is the Greatest, Allah is the Greatest.

title: Seeking Goodness in Journey
arabic: اللَّهُمَّ اكْفِنَا مَا أَهَمَّنَا وَمَا لَا نُبَالِي
translation: O Allah, suffice us against what concerns us and what we do not worry about.

title: Dua for Safe Arrival
arabic: اللَّهُمَّ بَلِّغْنَا مَقْصَدَنَا بِسَلَامٍ
translation: O Allah, make us reach our destination safely.

title: Trusting Allah
arabic: حَسْبِيَ اللَّهُ لَا إِلَٰهَ إِلَّا هُوَ عَلَيْهِ تَوَكَّلْتُ
translation: Allah is sufficient for me. There is no god except Him. Upon Him I rely.

title: Opening Dua (Istiftah)
arabic: سُبْحَانَكَ اللَّهُمَّ وَبِحَمْدِكَ، وَتَبَارَكَ اسْمُكَ، وَتَعَالَىٰ جَدُّكَ، وَلَا إِلَٰهَ غَيْرُكَ
translation: Glory is to You, O Allah, and praise is for You. Blessed is Your Name, Exalted is Your Majesty, and there is no deity besides You.

title: Opening Dua After Takbeer
arabic: اللَّهُمَّ بَاعِدْ بَيْنِي وَبَيْنَ خَطَايَايَ كَمَا بَاعَدْتَ بَيْنَ الْمَشْرِقِ وَالْمَغْرِبِ، اللَّهُمَّ نَقِّنِي مِنْ خَطَايَايَ كَمَا يُنَقَّى الثَّوْبُ الْأَبْيَضُ مِنَ الدَّنَسِ، اللَّهُمَّ اغْسِلْنِي مِنْ خَطَايَايَ بِالثَّلْجِ وَالْمَاءِ وَالْبَرَدِ
translation: O Allah, distance me from my sins as You have distanced the East from the West. O Allah, purify me from my sins as a white garment is cleansed from dirt. O Allah, wash away my sins with snow, water and hail.

title: Dua Before Recitation
arabic: أَعُوذُ بِاللَّهِ مِنَ الشَّيْطَانِ الرَّجِيمِ
translation: I seek refuge with Allah from the accursed Satan.

title: Ruku Dua
arabic: سُبْحَانَ رَبِّيَ الْعَظِيمِ
translation: Glory is to my Lord, the Magnificent.

title: Rising From Ruku
arabic: سَمِعَ اللَّهُ لِمَنْ حَمِدَهُ
translation: Allah hears the one who praises Him.

title: After Rising From Ruku
arabic: رَبَّنَا وَلَكَ الْحَمْدُ
translation: Our Lord, and to You belongs all praise.

title: Sujood Dua
arabic: سُبْحَانَ رَبِّيَ الْأَعْلَى
translation: Glory is to my Lord, the Most High.

title: Between Two Sajdahs
arabic: رَبِّ اغْفِرْ لِي، رَبِّ اغْفِرْ لِي
translation: My Lord, forgive me. My Lord, forgive me.

title: Tashahhud
arabic: التَّحِيَّاتُ لِلَّهِ وَالصَّلَوَاتُ وَالطَّيِّبَاتُ، السَّلَامُ عَلَيْكَ أَيُّهَا النَّبِيُّ وَرَحْمَةُ اللَّهِ وَبَرَكَاتُهُ
translation: All greetings, prayers and good deeds are for Allah. Peace be upon you, O Prophet, and the mercy and blessings of Allah.

title: Sending Salawat
arabic: اللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ وَعَلَىٰ آلِ مُحَمَّدٍ
translation: O Allah, send blessings upon Muhammad and the family of Muhammad.

title: Seeking Refuge Before Salam
arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ عَذَابِ جَهَنَّمَ، وَمِنْ عَذَابِ الْقَبْرِ، وَمِنْ فِتْنَةِ الْمَحْيَا وَالْمَمَاتِ، وَمِنْ شَرِّ فِتْنَةِ الْمَسِيحِ الدَّجَّالِ
translation: O Allah, I seek refuge in You from the punishment of Hell, from the punishment of the grave, from the trials of life and death, and from the evil trial of the False Messiah.

title: Dua For Forgiveness
arabic: اللَّهُمَّ اغْفِرْ لِي مَا قَدَّمْتُ وَمَا أَخَّرْتُ، وَمَا أَسْرَرْتُ وَمَا أَعْلَنْتُ
translation: O Allah, forgive me for what I have done before and what I will do later, what I have done secretly and what I have done openly.

title: Dua After Tashahhud
arabic: اللَّهُمَّ أَعِنِّي عَلَىٰ ذِكْرِكَ وَشُكْرِكَ وَحُسْنِ عِبَادَتِكَ
translation: O Allah, help me to remember You, to be grateful to You, and to worship You in the best manner.

title: Dua For Goodness
arabic: رَبَّنَا آتِنَا فِي الدُّنْيَا حَسَنَةً وَفِي الْآخِرَةِ حَسَنَةً وَقِنَا عَذَابَ النَّارِ
translation: Our Lord, give us good in this world and good in the Hereafter, and protect us from the punishment of the Fire.

title: Dua For Knowledge
arabic: رَبِّ زِدْنِي عِلْمًا
translation: My Lord, increase me in knowledge.

title: Dua For Parents
arabic: رَبِّ ارْحَمْهُمَا كَمَا رَبَّيَانِي صَغِيرًا
translation: My Lord, have mercy upon them as they brought me up when I was young.

title: Dua For Steadfastness
arabic: رَبَّنَا لَا تُزِغْ قُلُوبَنَا بَعْدَ إِذْ هَدَيْتَنَا وَهَبْ لَنَا مِنْ لَدُنْكَ رَحْمَةً
translation: Our Lord, do not let our hearts deviate after You have guided us and grant us mercy from Yourself.

title: Dua For Acceptance
arabic: رَبَّنَا تَقَبَّلْ مِنَّا إِنَّكَ أَنْتَ السَّمِيعُ الْعَلِيمُ
translation: Our Lord, accept from us. Indeed You are the All-Hearing, the All-Knowing.

title: Dua For Mercy
arabic: رَبَّنَا آمَنَّا فَاغْفِرْ لَنَا وَارْحَمْنَا وَأَنْتَ خَيْرُ الرَّاحِمِينَ
translation: Our Lord, we have believed, so forgive us and have mercy upon us, and You are the best of those who show mercy.

title: Dua For Protection
arabic: رَبِّ أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ هَمَزَاتِ الشَّيَاطِينِ
translation: My Lord, I seek refuge in You from the whispers and attacks of the devils.

title: Dua For Guidance
arabic: رَبَّنَا آمَنَّا فَاغْفِرْ لَنَا ذُنُوبَنَا وَقِنَا عَذَابَ النَّارِ
translation: Our Lord, we have believed, so forgive us our sins and protect us from the punishment of the Fire.

title: Dua For Ease
arabic: رَبِّ اشْرَحْ لِي صَدْرِي ۝ وَيَسِّرْ لِي أَمْرِي
translation: My Lord, expand for me my chest and make my task easy for me.

title: Dua For Patience
arabic: رَبَّنَا أَفْرِغْ عَلَيْنَا صَبْرًا وَثَبِّتْ أَقْدَامَنَا
translation: Our Lord, pour upon us patience and make our feet firm.

title: Dua For Allah's Help
arabic: حَسْبُنَا اللَّهُ وَنِعْمَ الْوَكِيلُ
translation: Allah is sufficient for us, and He is the best disposer of affairs.

title: Dua For Repentance
arabic: رَبَّنَا ظَلَمْنَا أَنْفُسَنَا وَإِنْ لَمْ تَغْفِرْ لَنَا وَتَرْحَمْنَا لَنَكُونَنَّ مِنَ الْخَاسِرِينَ
translation: Our Lord, we have wronged ourselves, and if You do not forgive us and have mercy upon us, we will surely be among the losers.

title: Dua After Salah
arabic: أَسْتَغْفِرُ اللَّهَ، أَسْتَغْفِرُ اللَّهَ، أَسْتَغْفِرُ اللَّهَ
translation: I seek forgiveness from Allah, I seek forgiveness from Allah, I seek forgiveness from Allah.

title: After Salah Dhikr
arabic: لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا اللَّهُ وَحْدَهُ لَا شَرِيكَ لَهُ، لَهُ الْمُلْكُ وَلَهُ الْحَمْدُ
translation: There is no deity except Allah alone, without any partner. To Him belongs the dominion and all praise.

title: Tasbeeh After Prayer
arabic: سُبْحَانَ اللَّهِ ٣٣، وَالْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ ٣٣، وَاللَّهُ أَكْبَرُ ٣٣
translation: Glory be to Allah 33 times, all praise is for Allah 33 times, Allah is the Greatest 33 times.

title: Completing Tasbeeh
arabic: لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا اللَّهُ وَحْدَهُ لَا شَرِيكَ لَهُ
translation: There is no deity except Allah alone, without any partner.

title: Dua For Forgiveness And Mercy
arabic: اللَّهُمَّ اغْفِرْ لِي وَارْحَمْنِي وَاهْدِنِي وَعَافِنِي وَارْزُقْنِي
translation: O Allah, forgive me, have mercy on me, guide me, grant me well-being, and provide for me.

title: Protection From Evil
arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنَ الْكُفْرِ وَالْفَقْرِ وَعَذَابِ الْقَبْرِ
translation: O Allah, I seek refuge in You from disbelief, poverty and the punishment of the grave.

title: Before Sleeping Dua
arabic: بِاسْمِكَ اللَّهُمَّ أَمُوتُ وَأَحْيَا
translation: In Your Name, O Allah, I die and I live.

title: Sleeping on Right Side
arabic: اللَّهُمَّ أَسْلَمْتُ نَفْسِي إِلَيْكَ، وَفَوَّضْتُ أَمْرِي إِلَيْكَ
translation: O Allah, I submit myself to You and entrust my affairs to You.

title: Seeking Protection Before Sleep
arabic: بِاسْمِكَ رَبِّي وَضَعْتُ جَنْبِي، وَبِكَ أَرْفَعُهُ
translation: In Your Name, my Lord, I lay down my side and by You I raise it.

title: Ayat Al-Kursi Before Sleep
arabic: اللَّهُ لَا إِلَٰهَ إِلَّا هُوَ الْحَيُّ الْقَيُّومُ ۚ لَا تَأْخُذُهُ سِنَةٌ وَلَا نَوْمٌ ۚ لَهُ مَا فِي السَّمَاوَاتِ وَمَا فِي الْأَرْضِ ۗ مَنْ ذَا الَّذِي يَشْفَعُ عِنْدَهُ إِلَّا بِإِذْنِهِ ۚ يَعْلَمُ مَا بَيْنَ أَيْدِيهِمْ وَمَا خَلْفَهُمْ وَلَا يُحِيطُونَ بِشَيْءٍ مِنْ عِلْمِهِ إِلَّا بِمَا شَاءَ ۚ وَسِعَ كُرْسِيُّهُ السَّمَاوَاتِ وَالْأَرْضَ ۖ وَلَا يَئُودُهُ حِفْظُهُمَا ۚ وَهُوَ الْعَلِيُّ الْعَظِيمُ
translation: Allah! There is no deity except Him, the Ever-Living, the Sustainer of all existence. Neither drowsiness overtakes Him nor sleep. To Him belongs whatever is in the heavens and whatever is on the earth. Who is it that can intercede with Him except by His permission? He knows what is before them and what is behind them, and they encompass nothing of His knowledge except what He wills. His Kursi extends over the heavens and the earth, and their preservation does not tire Him. And He is the Most High, the Most Great.

title: Reciting Al-Ikhlas Before Sleep
arabic: قُلْ هُوَ اللَّهُ أَحَدٌ
translation: Say: He is Allah, One.

title: Reciting Al-Falaq Before Sleep
arabic: قُلْ أَعُوذُ بِرَبِّ الْفَلَقِ
translation: Say: I seek refuge in the Lord of the daybreak.

title: Reciting An-Nas Before Sleep
arabic: قُلْ أَعُوذُ بِرَبِّ النَّاسِ
translation: Say: I seek refuge in the Lord of mankind.

title: Tasbeeh Before Sleeping
arabic: سُبْحَانَ اللَّهِ ٣٣، الْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ ٣٣، اللَّهُ أَكْبَرُ ٣٤
translation: Glory be to Allah 33 times, praise be to Allah 33 times, and Allah is the Greatest 34 times.

title: Dua For Forgiveness Before Sleep
arabic: اللَّهُمَّ اغْفِرْ لِي ذَنْبِي وَأَذْهِبْ غَيْظَ قَلْبِي
translation: O Allah, forgive my sin and remove the anger from my heart.

title: Protection From Punishment
arabic: اللَّهُمَّ قِنِي عَذَابَكَ يَوْمَ تَبْعَثُ عِبَادَكَ
translation: O Allah, protect me from Your punishment on the day You resurrect Your servants.

title: Praise Before Sleep
arabic: الْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ الَّذِي أَطْعَمَنَا وَسَقَانَا وَكَفَانَا وَآوَانَا
translation: All praise is for Allah who fed us, gave us drink, sufficed us and gave us shelter.

title: Dua For Peaceful Sleep
arabic: اللَّهُمَّ بِاسْمِكَ أَحْيَا وَبِاسْمِكَ أَمُوتُ
translation: O Allah, in Your Name I live and in Your Name I die.

title: Seeking Allah's Mercy
arabic: اللَّهُمَّ ارْحَمْنِي وَاغْفِرْ لِي
translation: O Allah, have mercy on me and forgive me.

title: Remembering Allah Before Sleep
arabic: لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا اللَّهُ
translation: There is no deity except Allah.

title: Trusting Allah Before Sleep
arabic: تَوَكَّلْتُ عَلَى اللَّهِ
translation: I place my trust in Allah.

title: Before Eating
arabic: بِسْمِ اللَّهِ
translation: In the Name of Allah.

title: If One Forgets To Say Bismillah
arabic: بِسْمِ اللَّهِ فِي أَوَّلِهِ وَآخِرِهِ
translation: In the Name of Allah at the beginning and at the end.

title: After Eating
arabic: الْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ الَّذِي أَطْعَمَنِي هَذَا وَرَزَقَنِيهِ مِنْ غَيْرِ حَوْلٍ مِنِّي وَلَا قُوَّةٍ
translation: All praise is for Allah who fed me this and provided it for me without any power or strength from me.

title: Praise After Eating
arabic: الْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ حَمْدًا كَثِيرًا طَيِّبًا مُبَارَكًا فِيهِ غَيْرَ مَكْفِيٍّ وَلَا مُوَدَّعٍ وَلَا مُسْتَغْنًى عَنْهُ رَبَّنَا
translation: All praise is for Allah, abundant, pure and blessed praise. This praise is never sufficient, nor can it be abandoned, nor can we do without You, our Lord.

title: Dua For Blessing In Food
arabic: اللَّهُمَّ بَارِكْ لَنَا فِيهِ وَأَطْعِمْنَا خَيْرًا مِنْهُ
translation: O Allah, bless it for us and provide us with something better than it.

title: Dua When Drinking Milk
arabic: اللَّهُمَّ بَارِكْ لَنَا فِيهِ وَزِدْنَا مِنْهُ
translation: O Allah, bless it for us and increase it for us.

title: Dua For Host
arabic: اللَّهُمَّ بَارِكْ لَهُمْ فِيمَا رَزَقْتَهُمْ وَاغْفِرْ لَهُمْ وَارْحَمْهُمْ
translation: O Allah, bless what You have provided them, forgive them and have mercy on them.

title: After Drinking
arabic: الْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ
translation: All praise is for Allah.

title: Dua For Anxiety And Grief
arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنَ الْهَمِّ وَالْحَزَنِ، وَأَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنَ الْعَجْزِ وَالْكَسَلِ، وَأَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنَ الْجُبْنِ وَالْبُخْلِ، وَأَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ غَلَبَةِ الدَّيْنِ وَقَهْرِ الرِّجَالِ
translation: O Allah, I seek refuge in You from anxiety and sorrow, from weakness and laziness, from cowardice and miserliness, and from the burden of debt and being overpowered by people.

title: Dua When Feeling Distressed
arabic: لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ سُبْحَانَكَ إِنِّي كُنْتُ مِنَ الظَّالِمِينَ
translation: There is no deity except You. Glory be to You. Indeed, I have been among the wrongdoers.

title: Dua For Reliance On Allah
arabic: حَسْبِيَ اللَّهُ لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا هُوَ ۖ عَلَيْهِ تَوَكَّلْتُ وَهُوَ رَبُّ الْعَرْشِ الْعَظِيمِ
translation: Allah is sufficient for me. There is no deity except Him. Upon Him I rely, and He is the Lord of the Mighty Throne.

title: Dua For Ease
arabic: رَبِّ اشْرَحْ لِي صَدْرِي ۝ وَيَسِّرْ لِي أَمْرِي
translation: My Lord, expand my chest and make my task easy for me.

title: Dua For Patience
arabic: رَبَّنَا أَفْرِغْ عَلَيْنَا صَبْرًا وَثَبِّتْ أَقْدَامَنَا
translation: Our Lord, pour upon us patience and make our feet firm.

title: Dua For Mercy
arabic: رَبِّ اغْفِرْ وَارْحَمْ وَأَنْتَ خَيْرُ الرَّاحِمِينَ
translation: My Lord, forgive and have mercy, and You are the best of those who show mercy.

title: Dua Against Hardship
arabic: اللَّهُمَّ لَا سَهْلَ إِلَّا مَا جَعَلْتَهُ سَهْلًا
translation: O Allah, there is no ease except what You make easy.

title: Dua For Removing Worry
arabic: اللَّهُمَّ اكْفِنِي بِحَلَالِكَ عَنْ حَرَامِكَ وَأَغْنِنِي بِفَضْلِكَ عَمَّنْ سِوَاكَ
translation: O Allah, suffice me with what You have made lawful instead of what You have forbidden, and make me independent of all others through Your bounty.

title: Dua For Heart Peace
arabic: أَلَا بِذِكْرِ اللَّهِ تَطْمَئِنُّ الْقُلُوبُ
translation: Verily, in the remembrance of Allah hearts find rest.

title: Dua Seeking Allah's Help
arabic: إِيَّاكَ نَعْبُدُ وَإِيَّاكَ نَسْتَعِينُ
translation: You alone we worship, and You alone we ask for help.

title: Dua For Protection From Fear
arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ شَرِّ نَفْسِي
translation: O Allah, I seek refuge in You from the evil of my own self.

title: Dua For Trust
arabic: تَوَكَّلْتُ عَلَى اللَّهِ
translation: I place my trust in Allah.

title: Dua For Forgiveness
arabic: رَبِّ اغْفِرْ لِي وَتُبْ عَلَيَّ إِنَّكَ أَنْتَ التَّوَّابُ الرَّحِيمُ
translation: My Lord, forgive me and accept my repentance. Indeed, You are the Most Accepting of repentance, the Most Merciful.

title: Dua For Guidance
arabic: اهْدِنَا الصِّرَاطَ الْمُسْتَقِيمَ
translation: Guide us to the straight path.

title: Dua For Protection
arabic: رَبِّ أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ هَمَزَاتِ الشَّيَاطِينِ
translation: My Lord, I seek refuge in You from the whispers of the devils.

title: Dua For Good Ending
arabic: رَبَّنَا لَا تُزِغْ قُلُوبَنَا بَعْدَ إِذْ هَدَيْتَنَا
translation: Our Lord, do not let our hearts deviate after You have guided us.

title: Dua For Allah's Mercy
arabic: وَقُلْ رَبِّ اغْفِرْ وَارْحَمْ
translation: And say: My Lord, forgive and have mercy.

title: Dua For Strength
arabic: لَا حَوْلَ وَلَا قُوَّةَ إِلَّا بِاللَّهِ
translation: There is no power and no strength except with Allah.

title: Dua For Contentment
arabic: رَضِيتُ بِاللَّهِ رَبًّا
translation: I am pleased with Allah as my Lord.

title: Dua For Protection From Sadness
arabic: اللَّهُمَّ اجْعَلِ الْقُرْآنَ رَبِيعَ قَلْبِي وَنُورَ صَدْرِي
translation: O Allah, make the Quran the spring of my heart and the light of my chest.

title: Dua When Rain Begins
arabic: اللَّهُمَّ صَيِّبًا نَافِعًا
translation: O Allah, (send) beneficial rain.

title: After Rain
arabic: مُطِرْنَا بِفَضْلِ اللَّهِ وَرَحْمَتِهِ
translation: We have been given rain by the فضل (bounty) and mercy of Allah.

title: Dua For Rain Benefit
arabic: اللَّهُمَّ اجْعَلْهُ صَيِّبًا نَافِعًا
translation: O Allah, make it beneficial rain.

title: Dua When Rain Is Excessive
arabic: اللَّهُمَّ حَوَالَيْنَا وَلَا عَلَيْنَا
translation: O Allah, (let it fall) around us, not upon us.

title: Dua For Wind
arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ خَيْرَهَا وَأَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ شَرِّهَا
translation: O Allah, I ask You for its good and seek refuge in You from its evil.

title: Dua During Thunder
arabic: سُبْحَانَ الَّذِي يُسَبِّحُ الرَّعْدُ بِحَمْدِهِ وَالْمَلَائِكَةُ مِنْ خِيفَتِهِ
translation: Glory is to Him whom thunder glorifies with praise, and the angels (too) out of His fear.
